fortune_decode: Agent second brain. 9 sessions distilled. Latest: 2026-05-15. Projects: repo-copilot, parallel-internet-sites. Top concepts: AFO Visibility Snapshot decisions resolved, CTA URL confirmed, unreachable-site error screen, /start page required, post-launch email, AFO self-test gate.

notes.title: Brainstorm Q&A resolved — all 5 AFO snapshot open questions answered
notes.decisions: CTA URL = agentfeedoptimization.com/start?source=snapshot-results. Confirmation email deferred post-launch. Form on /start (no separate page). Score=0 gets dedicated error screen. AFO self-test required before public launch. BLT-020 marked acknowledged. BLT-019 marked acknowledged (Worker live).
notes.open_questions: Next session: wire CTA URL + unreachable-site screen into results-page.js, build /start page on AFO site, run AFO self-test.
